description: You are a Video Streaming Reliability Engineer diagnosing dropped frames on ingest servers. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'I/O Buffering Efficiency' containing four graphs that apply specific mathematical transformations to correlate EC2 instance 1's network and disk metrics. The graph 'Cumulative Network Ingest' must apply the integral() function to servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in. The graph 'Network Ingress Rate (Bits)' must use the scale() function to multiply servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in by 8. The graph 'Write-to-Ingest Ratio' must use divideSeries() to show the ratio of disk writes (servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes) as the numerator to network ingest (servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in) as the denominator. The graph 'Robust Disk I/O' must apply a movingMedian() with a window size of 10 to servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes. Save the dashboard with these exact titles and configurations.
